home.heroDescription: No time to waste. Quick news summaries and free online tools.

tools.pageDescription: PDF merger, image tools, text rewriting, JSON formatter and more. No registration needed. Fast, free and secure.

categories.pdfDesc: Merge, split, and compress PDF files
categories.imageDesc: Compress, resize, crop, and convert images

about.title: About Us
about.metaDescription: About Vaxtim Yoxdu - A free AI online tools platform.
about.motto: No time to waste — we are here for you
about.description: Vaxtim Yoxdu is a platform offering quick news summaries in Azerbaijani and free online tools. Our goal is to save your time: delivering important news in a clear and concise way while offering free tools to simplify your daily tasks.
about.missionDescription: We believe that quality information and useful tools should be free and easily accessible for everyone. No registration required, no hidden fees. Just powerful tools that work and news summaries that save your time.
about.privacyDescription: Most of our tools run directly in your browser — your data never leaves your device. For AI-powered tools, your data is processed securely and never stored.
about.contactDescription: Have ideas or suggestions? Feel free to write to us:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy for the Vaxtim Yoxdu online tools platform.
privacy.collectDescription: We collect minimal information to provide our services. Client-side tools process data entirely in your browser - nothing is sent to our servers.
privacy.aiDescription: For AI-powered tools, your input text is sent to our secure servers for processing. We do not store, log, or use your input data for training purposes. Data is deleted immediately after processing.
privacy.analyticsDescription: We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors use our site. This collects anonymous usage data such as page views, browser type, and general location.
privacy.advertisingDescription: We display advertisements through Google AdSense and other partners. These services may use cookies to serve relevant ads based on your browsing activity.
privacy.cookiesDescription: We use essential cookies for site functionality and third-party cookies for analytics and advertising. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.
privacy.contactDescription: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Terms of service for the Vaxtim Yoxdu online tools platform.
terms.acceptDescription: By using Vaxtim Yoxdu, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.useDescription: Our tools are provided free of charge for personal and commercial use. You may not use our services for any illegal or unauthorized purpose.
terms.limitationsDescription: AI-powered tools have usage limits to ensure fair access for all users. We reserve the right to restrict access to users who abuse our services.
terms.disclaimerDescription: Our tools are provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not responsible for any data loss or damages resulting from the use of our services.
terms.changesDescription: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of updated terms.

footer.description: Quick news summaries and free online tools. No registration needed.
